title: limonium salsuginosum
intro: Limonium salsuginosum, also known as saltwort, is a succulent shrub native to coastal areas and salt marshes. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and alleviating respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Limonium salsuginosum is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
